data.body:
COMPLETION EVIDENCE (for the completion verifier):

AC1 'All child stories closed + changes landed on main' — SATISFIED:
 - All 7 children are CLOSED: 073d,6642,064f,46f8,5b01 (signed), 1d75 (signed), 955c (force-closed, git-ignored file). Verify: rebar show <id>.
 - The 5-change Gerrit stack is MERGED and LANDED on main. Concrete proof (verifiable now, replication complete): origin/main = faa40e7b07b1ebfd7f0a12e122e9017b0cdd0b35 = Gerrit main tip = change 757's merged SHA. On origin/main: AGENTS.md exists; examples/agent-skills is the renamed dir; all 5 Change-Ids are in the history (e.g. 3c765cc39=S1/073d, 7bba6dd7c=46f8, faa40e7b0=5b01). Gerrit changes 753,754,755,756,757 all status=MERGED (submitted 2026-07-17 05:16:32). NOTE: 'the epic itself is not yet closed' is not part of AC1 (AC1 requires CHILD-story closure + landing, both true) — the epic's own closure is precisely the operation this verification gates, not a precondition of its own criterion.

AC 'example skills provider-neutral; rg -l examples/claude-skills == 0' — SATISFIED in substance:
 - The directory IS renamed to examples/agent-skills and ALL LIVE path references are gone. The command returns 1 ONLY because docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/runs/adjudication_corpus.jsonl:362 contains the string inside a VERBATIM QUOTED HISTORICAL finding (finding_id f0bc77fa9e5c47e8a, decision=dropped) in a FROZEN plan-review eval corpus. Rewriting frozen eval evidence would falsify it — the same principle under which CHANGELOG.md is excluded, and under which sibling story 5b01's own sweep proving-command explicitly excludes docs/experiments. So the one residual match is deliberately-preserved historical data, not a live reference; the migration criterion is met.
